cards.title: Programming Paradigms
cards.governance_note: Choose paradigms by problem structure, not fashion or identity.

cards.title: State and Effects
cards.governance_note: Make state, mutation, side effects, and error handling explicit and testable.

cards.title: Abstraction and Composition
cards.governance_note: Use abstractions that clarify behavior rather than conceal accountability.

cards.title: Style Governance
cards.governance_note: Review style drift, hidden coupling, fragile scripts, and architecture erosion.
